name: 48"x58" All Star Knit Kids' Throw Blanket Red- Pillowfort™
description: Infuse fun, cozy vibes into your child's room with this 48-Inch x 58-Inch All Star Knit Throw Blanket from Pillowfort™. This midweight blanket is adorned with a timeless striped pattern in red and navy blue shades and a typographic design that reads "All Star" in red and white with a white star at the center for a sporty look. Made of 100% acrylic fabric with a cozy sweater-knit construction, the blanket feels soft on the skin while providing just the right amount of warmth for naps, snuggles, bedtime stories and sleep. Plus, it's machine washable for added convenience.
